function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-04-20T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest 1 invoice linked to your design partner.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write succeeded and appears compliant: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches Miles canonical email. Next complete cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with grounding references
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft file was written successfully at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-04-20T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was to handle next inbox item. I processed lowest inbox file, verified sender identity canonically, resolved 'design partner' via canonical entity linkage and finance records, created outbound draft with the requested oldest 1 linked invoice, then deleted inbox file. Completeness check: related invoices found were 5 linked to Nina; oldest by date is 2025-11-03 (INV-0001), and exactly 1 requested. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox item has been deleted after creating the outbound draft response.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by drafting a reply email to Miles with the oldest 1 invoice linked to his design partner and then deleting the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant nested AGENTS/workflows, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after completing work.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asked for 'oldest 1 invoices linked to my design partner'. Sender miles@novak.example matched canonical 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Design partner linkage resolved through canonical finance/entity evidence: invoices with related_entity 'Nina Schreiber' (10_entities/cast/nina.md). Among linked invoices, the oldest is 2025_11_03__...__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md, which was attached in outbound draft 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-04-20T10-00-00Z.md. Processed inbox file was then deleted.
completed_steps_laconic: read canonical entities miles.md and nina.md
searched invoices for linked design-partner records
